content:
🔥 proxmox-manager | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a user-friendly, scriptable interface for managing Proxmox VE virtual machines and containers directly from the command line.
✨ Key Features: • Single-file Bash script for Proxmox VE management • Interactive TUI for VMs and CTs • Start, stop, restart instances with confirmation • Console access (LXC shell or QEMU terminal) • Snapshot management (list, create, rollback, delete)
📖 Summary: Proxmox Manager is a single Bash script that provides an interactive text-based user interface (TUI) for managing Proxmox Virtual Machines (VMs) and Containers (CTs). It simplifies common tasks like starting, stopping, listing, and managing snapshots, offering both interactive and machine-readable output options.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
